evals.prompt: analyze https://www.adsagent.org — how's the SEO on the homepage?
evals.expected_output: A scored single-page report covering E-E-A-T, content quality, on-page SEO, metadata audit, heading structure, schema markup, and actionable fixes for the homepage

evals.prompt: can you check this page for me? https://www.pawsvip.com/services/dog-grooming — I want to know if the content is good enough to rank
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive page analysis with E-E-A-T scores, search intent analysis (transactional intent for service page), content quality assessment, competitive comparison, and specific fixes

evals.prompt: what's wrong with this blog post's SEO? https://www.adsagent.org/blog/google-ads-optimization-guide
evals.expected_output: A detailed content quality audit for a blog post — informational intent alignment, E-E-A-T evaluation, helpful content signals, readability analysis, heading structure review, and prioritized fixes
